concerns.text: FR-009 (Stratify real-world results by φ bins) has no corresponding task. T032/T033 handle loading, error handling, and alternative metrics (FR-006, FR-007, FR-010), but no task exists to perform the stratification logic or output the stratified results required by FR-009.

FR-011 (Sensitivity analysis report comparing coverage across N=50, 100, 200) is not explicitly covered by a dedicated task. While T016 runs the simulation loops for these N values, there is no task to aggregate these specific results into the required 'sensitivity analysis report' (distinct from the general summary report in T027).

T032 and T033 are tagged [US3] but the plan explicitly blocks US-3 execution. While the tasks are marked 'blocked-ready', the tags imply active implementation of a blocked story. Consider removing [US3] tags or adding a [BLOCKED] tag to clarify these are stubs for a future state, preventing confusion during execution.
